_readme: Season One posting calendar. Drives publish_youtube.py / publish_instagram.py.
'day' is relative to LAUNCH_DATE (set when Charlie picks it); post times are
17:00 local unless 'time' overrides. 'platforms': ig | yt | tiktok (tiktok
stays manual/1-tap: files + captions here are the prep pack).
Paths are repo-relative. Items with status 'blocked' name their gate.

Rewritten 2026-07-19 against the RISING TIDE reboot (SAGA_OUTLINE.md): ep1 = re-shot ending pending 54cr clip; ep2 = HIGH WATER MARK den ep, not the old ep2_max sumo cut; old ep3 Steve kit is pre-reboot and retired.

posts.caption: the whole island is here. episode one drops tomorrow. 🌋

posts.title: TINY DINOS — Ep. 1: The Last Good Day
posts.caption: nobody touches the leaf. then the ocean did. 🍃🌊 (ep. 1)
posts.cover_hint: the leap over Max — it IS the first frame (0.5s), under the hook card
posts.pinned_comment: ep. 2 drops when this hits 100 likes 👀
posts.status: ready — v5 (59.5s, -14.0 LUFS) rebuilt 2026-07-19 after Charlie's v4 notes
posts.note: EP1 v5. v4 restored the Arthur narration and the turn; v5 answers Charlie's next three notes: the wrap-up was too slow, the outro card had to come back, and he wanted the two of them to end in a scuffle looking at the camera before the logo. Ending is now tide (continuous, turn intact, tail trimmed) -> the look -> MIX-UP clip A (they pile into a dust cloud) -> MIX-UP clip B (they clock the camera) -> logo card. The mix-up is two clips on purpose: the camera look is the button and Seedance drops the tail of a clip, so asking one clip for 'scuffle THEN look' would have put the punchline in the drop zone. Both scuffle clips generated wide, so they are punched in (crop 0.72) to read on a phone. Music returns for the scuffle and carries the card out.
